response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: Look, when it comes to talking about something as big and complicated as public health—especially stuff like vaccines—it can feel super overwhelming, right? I mean, everyone has their own thing they've read online or heard from a friend, and sometimes those sources are just... wild. Since I spend so much time scrolling through social media, I’ve noticed how quickly things spiral into these huge, emotional arguments where nobody is actually trying to understand the science anymore; it’s just about proving who was
